query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A monochromatic interior view of a symmetrical corridor or enclosed passage. Rows of circular light sources or reflective spots recede along the ceiling and floor in perspective, while the side walls display narrow vertical ridges or textured patterns. The center and far end of the space are swallowed by profound shadow, leaving only the peripheral architecture and glowing spots clearly visible. The surfaces appear smooth, metallic, or wet.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochromatic, highly abstract interior view of a symmetrical corridor subjected to extreme underexposure that buries the center and far end in impenetrable blackness. Rows of circular lights or reflective spots line the ceiling and floor, while textured side walls dissolve into surrounding darkness. The severe crushed shadows and near-total absence of detail create an oppressive atmosphere of dread and unease, reducing the recognizable space to a minimal formal arrangement of light, shadow, and texture.
